headline: A Look At Duke Energy (DUK) Valuation As Analysts And DCF Offer Mixed Signals
summary: Why Duke Energy Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Today Duke Energy (DUK) is back in focus after recent share moves, with the stock showing small shifts over the past week and month while longer term returns sit in the mid to high single digits. See our latest analysis for Duke Energy. The recent 2.23% 1 day share price return and 9.04% 90 day share price return at around $128 suggest interest has been firming, while the 56.17% 5 year total shareholder return points to steady long term...
